text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
O-Oh no… I lent out my notebook 
without thinking about it…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I've just realized, I think I drew 
something in it… What was it again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A cat? …A dog? It might've been Oka from the manga Uma ☆ Koi…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ooh… I hope they don't find it!
